packs.title: Baobab Rooted Technology
packs.signal: transmission, memory, calm intelligence and rooted technology
packs.description: Premium Baobab identity for the African cultural mini OS: subtle African thinking, calm depth, ivory readability, volcanic dark surfaces, baobab green and textile indigo.
visual_rules: Baobab must feel African through philosophy and interaction, not through decorative excess.
Use copper, earth and gold only as restrained highlights; never flood the UI with red, yellow, brown or orange.
Keep indigo, ivory and baobab green visible to create premium contrast and calm depth.
Patterns are micro details for dividers, empty states and cultural moments; never place motifs everywhere.
Avoid safari, postcard, folklore, animal, mask-heavy or wax-heavy visual shortcuts.
Prefer root, branch, memory, oral transmission, community and learning metaphors over generic dashboard language.
Prioritize French-first public labels, generous spacing and offline-friendly navigation.

packs.title: Pan-African

packs.title: East Africa

packs.title: Southern Africa

packs.title: Diaspora
